channel.title: performance on @bitwizeshift on software
channel.description: Recent content in performance on @bitwizeshift on software

item.title: Creating a Fast and Efficient Delegate Type (Part 3)
item.author: bitwizeshift@rodusek.com (Matthew Rodusek)
item.description: In the previous post we reworked our Delegate object into something more modern and easy-to-use by using c++17 – but is this utility zero-overhead? In this post we will look at how to optimize this into a true zero-overhead utility.
